name: m3-bank-tests
description: Test automation suite for M3 Bank - Cypress E2E and Supertest API with SBTM support

scripts.test:api: mocha api/tests/**/*.spec.js --require api/config/baseConfig.js --reporter mochawesome --reporter-options reportDir=reports/api,reportFilename=api-report.html && start reports/api/api-report.html
scripts.test:all: npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e

author: M3 Bank QA Team
